hawkish_phrases: further gradual increases in the target range for the federal funds rate will be consistent with sustained expansion
the federal funds rate could be at or above their estimates of its neutral level sometime next year
it might soon be appropriate to modify the language in the postmeeting statement indicating that 'the stance of monetary policy remains accommodative'
a prolonged period in which the economy operated beyond potential could give rise to heightened inflationary pressures
with the economy already very strong and inflation expected to run at 2 percent on a sustained basis over the medium term
dovish_phrases: a few participants saw survey- or market-based indicators as suggesting that inflation expectations were not yet firmly anchored
a few participants noted that a temporary period of inflation modestly above 2 percent could be helpful in anchoring longer-run inflation expectations
the stance of monetary policy remains accommodative
uncertainty surrounding the level of the federal funds rate in the longer run
measures of longer-run inflation expectations derived from financial market data remained somewhat below levels consistent with the Committee's 2 percent objective
summary: The FOMC unanimously raised the target range for the federal funds rate by 25 basis points to 1.75-2.00 percent, removed forward guidance about rates remaining below longer-run levels, and signaled continued gradual increases with expectations that rates could reach neutral by 2019, displaying a clear tightening bias despite maintaining that policy remains accommodative.
